name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Premium UV protection sunglasses designed to block harmful sun rays while keeping your style modern and sharp. Perfect for beach trips, travel, and daily summer use. Lightweight frame ensures long-time comfort.

name: Beach Hat
description: Stylish beach hat made with breathable fabric to protect you from harsh sunlight. Ideal for vacations, beach walks, and outdoor summer activities. Keeps you cool and fashionable at the same time.

name: Summer T-Shirt
description: Soft and breathable cotton t-shirt designed for hot summer days. Provides maximum comfort and airflow while maintaining a trendy casual look. Perfect for everyday wear.

name: Sunscreen SPF50
description: High protection SPF50 sunscreen that shields your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays. Lightweight, non-greasy formula that keeps your skin safe, smooth, and hydrated during extreme summer heat.

name: Flip Flops
description: Comfortable and durable flip flops designed for daily summer use. Soft sole provides easy walking experience on beaches, streets, and indoor surfaces. Lightweight and water-resistant design.

name: Beach Bag
description: Spacious and stylish beach bag designed to carry all your summer essentials including towels, sunscreen, sunglasses, and more. Durable material with strong handles for heavy use.

name: Summer Shorts
description: Lightweight and breathable summer shorts made for maximum comfort in hot weather. Flexible fabric allows easy movement, making it perfect for outdoor activities and casual wear.

name: Straw Beach Hat
description: Classic straw beach hat with wide brim for full sun protection. Perfect for vacations, beach photography, and summer fashion styling. Lightweight and breathable design.

name: Aloe Vera Gel
description: Natural aloe vera gel that soothes sunburn, hydrates skin, and provides cooling relief during hot summer days. Gentle formula suitable for all skin types.

name: Casual Summer Sandals
description: Comfortable and stylish sandals designed for everyday summer use. Soft cushioning supports long walks while keeping your feet cool and relaxed.

name: Cooling Water Bottle
description: Insulated cooling water bottle designed to keep your drinks cold for hours. Perfect for gym, travel, and hot summer days to maintain hydration and freshness.

name: Beach Towel
description: Ultra-soft and highly absorbent beach towel perfect for swimming, sunbathing, and beach outings. Quick-dry material ensures comfort and convenience.
